title: Can't get Thunderbird Android to work with my outlook365 account
creator: christine26
content:
I use Thunderbird Android with my private smtp account, now I want to use it with my outlook365 company account, but when I install, after loggin in it says "need admin approval". The admin can't find where or what to approve. I tried Microsoft help which gave me copilot, but it points me to non-existing settings.

Anyone knows how to configure Thunderbird Android with Outlook365?
